title: Selecting and dragging multiple items - again
excerpt:

posts.author: slowsanderson (Jenny)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, i can see this has been asked before but I can’t see a resolution. I would like to select and drag multiple items at a time - is there anyway to do it?

I know how to select multiple items, I know how to filter the view, I know how to use the options to ‘move item to top’, but none of these are what I want to do - I want to grab a selection of items and move them to the place in the group. Any ideas?

Thank you

posts.author: Don (Don)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agree, this seems like a pretty basic functionality for stack ranking. The related thread misunderstood the question.
It would be great to be able to check multiple items, and shift them all up or down a few places to higher or lower on the board. To help stack rank.
